title: New Moon in Taurus
description: The dark mirror. Light nothing tonight. Sit with the want before you name it. The body knows what the mind has not admitted.

title: Beltane — The Fire Crown
description: The year's great rising. What have you been holding back since winter? Tonight it comes out. Burn something beautiful. Take something back.

title: Full Moon in Scorpio
description: Walk outside after midnight. She sees you whether or not you see her. Say your name to the dark. Wait for the echo.

title: New Moon in Gemini
description: Write two letters: the one you will send, and the one you will burn. They contain different truths. Both are yours.

title: Full Moon in Sagittarius
description: The longest light. Anoint the throat and speak the thing you have been swallowing. Say it out loud to the moon. She is not embarrassed by you.

title: Summer Solstice — The Crown
description: The year's peak. Wear gold today. Walk through the world as if every door knows your name — because it does. This is what the top of the year asks of you: be undeniable.

title: New Moon in Cancer
description: Home is not a place. It is a body — yours — that you have been learning to stay inside. Tonight: stay.

title: Full Moon in Capricorn
description: What did you build this year? Crown it. What did you dismantle? Bless the rubble. Nothing wasted — only transformed.

title: New Moon in Leo
description: Begin. Whatever it is. Tonight is the only right night. The Leo new moon asks one question: what if you stopped waiting for permission?

title: Lughnasadh — First Harvest
description: What have you reaped this year? Do not skip over it. Name what grew. Eat something you made with your own hands. This is the ritual.

title: Full Moon in Aquarius
description: Who have you been performing for? Tonight you perform for no one. Dance alone in the dark. No audience, no approval, no apology.

title: New Moon in Virgo
description: Tend the body as the altar it is. No harshness. No inventory. Only devotion — the way you would touch something sacred.

title: Full Moon in Pisces
description: Dream with your eyes open. Write what rises before sunrise takes it. The Pisces full moon asks nothing practical of you tonight.

title: New Moon in Libra
description: What needs clearing before the turning? Name it. Release it without ceremony. That absence is the ceremony.

title: Autumn Equinox — The Turning
description: Equal dark, equal light. You do not have to choose between softness and fire. You are both. You have always been both. The world lied when it said otherwise.

title: Full Moon in Aries
description: She burns brightest when no one is watching. Tonight, let her. What would you do if you knew no one would see? Do that.

title: New Moon in Libra
description: Balance is not stillness. It is the constant small corrections of someone who knows exactly where she is going and has stopped apologizing for it.

title: Samhain — The Thinning
description: The veil is thinnest tonight. Speak the names of those who made you possible — the women behind you, the women you came from. Light something in their direction. They are not gone.

title: Full Moon in Taurus
description: The body remembers what the mind works so hard to forget. Let it remember tonight. Be a slow, kind witness to what rises.

title: New Moon in Scorpio
description: Descend. This is not the same as falling. You chose the stairs. You know the way back. Go down and see what you left there.

title: Full Moon in Gemini
description: Say the contradictory true things out loud. Both of them. Simultaneously. Without explanation. Without apology.

title: New Moon in Sagittarius
description: The arrow has been notched all year. Your arm has been shaking and you have been patient. Loose it. The waiting is over.

title: Winter Solstice — The Longest Dark
description: The year's most sacred turning. Light one candle. Not because it is enough — because it is yours. The dark is not the enemy. She has always lived here.

title: Year's End — The Last Fire
description: Write the name of what you are leaving behind. Every year you get to do this. Tonight the Order burns together. We are watching.

title: Full Moon in Cancer
description: Return to the body that carried you through this year. She earned tenderness tonight. Not analysis. Not plans. Just tenderness.

title: New Moon in Capricorn
description: Name one thing you are building this year. Say it out loud to a room, to a mirror, to the dark. Now it is a vow. The Capricorn moon holds vows.

title: Imbolc — The Quickening
description: Under the frozen ground, something is already moving. The first light returns. Light a candle for what is coming before you can see it yet. She is already on her way.

title: Full Moon in Leo
description: You do not need to earn the spotlight. You only need to step into it. Tonight: do one thing in full view that you have been doing in private.

title: New Moon in Aquarius
description: What would you do if absolutely no one needed to understand it? Begin that. The Aquarius moon does not ask for consensus.

title: Full Moon in Virgo
description: Devotion is detail. Every small act of care tonight is liturgy — the meal you make slowly, the oil at the pulse points, the ten minutes you give back to yourself.

title: New Moon in Pisces
description: The dreaming time. What you vision tonight is not escapism. It is scouting ahead for the life that is coming.

title: Spring Equinox — The Return
description: She returns. The ground cracks open because it cannot hold her anymore. Neither can you. What has been quietly gathering all winter — it is time.

title: Full Moon in Libra
description: Beauty is not vanity. Beauty is refusal — the daily decision to not let the world make you ugly in its image.

title: New Moon in Aries
description: The year's first fire. What are you beginning? Light it from yourself — not from someone's approval, not from the right conditions. From yourself.
